semantic.role: CLI help and dashboard display utility – provides formatted console output for the ArchSpine CLI dashboard and help commands.
responsibilities: Print the ArchSpine product dashboard (sync status, enabled views, active rules) by delegating to DashboardService.
Print general CLI usage help text listing all available commands.
Print detailed help text for a specific CLI command based on command name.
outOfScope: Business logic, persistence, pipeline orchestration – this module formats and displays precomputed data only.
invariants: Must remain a thin CLI presentation layer; all data retrieval must be delegated to service modules.
Must not import or implement any pipeline, core, or persistence logic directly.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized help system for CLI commands and product status display, keeping presentation logic separate from business logic.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Refactored help output to remove legacy command aliases and update documentation references to match the refactored CLI structure.

publicSurface.description: Prints the ArchSpine product dashboard, including sync status, enabled views, and number of active rules, by fetching data from the DashboardService.
Prints general CLI usage help text listing all available commands.
Prints detailed help text for a specific CLI command identified by name (e.g., 'init', 'scan').

English.role: CLI help and dashboard display utility – provides formatted console output for the ArchSpine CLI dashboard and help commands.
responsibilities: Print the ArchSpine product dashboard (sync status, enabled views, active rules) by delegating to DashboardService.
Print general CLI usage help text listing all available commands.
Print detailed help text for a specific CLI command based on command name.
outOfScope: Business logic, persistence, pipeline orchestration – this module formats and displays precomputed data only.
